releaseNotes: 0.6.0 — Knowledge-base search. New quanto_knowledge_base_search MCP tool: one semantic search across the entire knowledge base — uploaded documents, Google Drive files, firm-wide SOPs, and Karbon notes/work items/profiles — spanning both client and firm scope, returning the matching chunks. quanto-document-lookup and the quanto-client-context guard are restructured to a search-first → drill-in flow: always search first, then fetch the full source document with quanto_document_get / quanto_firm_document_get / karbon_*_get using the document_id carried on each hit. quanto_document_query / quanto_firm_document_query gain source and has_text filters so a completed Google Drive copy is distinguishable from an upload that is still processing or stuck. 0.5.0 — Cowork + visuals + recurring runs + project-per-client. (1) Cowork install: add the marketplace from Customize → Personal plugins → + → Add marketplace (Cowork doesn't take /plugin slash commands; Claude Code CLI still does). (2) New quanto-report-templates skill: QuantoBooks-themed, self-contained HTML dashboards (management report, financial period) that report skills fill with MCP data and render — inline in Cowork, as a saved .html in Claude Code. (3) New quanto-schedule-workflow skill: per-client recurring runs (e.g. AR every Monday for one client) via the host's scheduler, pinned to a specific client_id and REVIEW-ONLY — an unattended run prepares + summarizes, never writes/pays/sends; flags that scheduled runs need the connector authenticated non-interactively. The cadence-appropriate workflows (ar-followup, flag-triage, ap-pay-run, transaction-cleanup, month-end-close, balance-sheet-review, management-report) offer to schedule themselves. (4) quanto-client-context now reflects the project-per-client setup: with no client named it infers from the project/workspace name (match against list_clients) and proposes-and-confirms, falling back to asking explicitly when there's no confident match. 0.4.0 — Ship the bundle as a Claude Code plugin marketplace. Claude Code / Cowork users can now install ALL skills with two commands (`/plugin marketplace add quantotechnologylabs/quantobooks-skills` then `/plugin install quantobooks@quantobooks`) instead of copying skills one by one; skills appear namespaced as `quantobooks:quanto-*` and update via `/plugin update`. The curl/npx loose-file installer still works for `~/.claude/skills/`. Claude Desktop does NOT support custom plugin marketplaces or filesystem skill folders today — the installer no longer pretends to install there; use the in-app Skills uploader or the downloadable zip instead. 0.3.0 — Prefix every skill with `quanto-` so QuantoBooks skills stay identifiable when users have many skills installed from different sources. Directory names + YAML `name:` frontmatter + all cross-skill references updated. NOTE: if you were installed at v0.2.0, the old unprefixed directories will be left behind in your skills folder — re-run the installer to clean them up (or delete the unprefixed copies by hand). 0.2.0 — Karbon practice-management context. The foundation guard (quanto-client-context) now documents the karbon_* tool tier (client profile, work items, notes, note comments) as an optional, read-only context source for mapped clients. quanto-client-onboarding-review, quanto-document-lookup, quanto-flag-triage, quanto-management-report, and quanto-month-end-close gained conditional Karbon steps so they fold in client profile / engagement / relationship context when present. All additive and best-effort — skills skip Karbon silently when a client isn't mapped. 0.1.0 — Initial skill bundle: foundation client-context guard + 13 workflow skills.
